title: pseuduvaria mollis
intro: Pseuduvaria mollis is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pseuduvaria mollis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment.
